# Randomized Controlled Trials

::: {.callout-note}
## Drafting note
Chapter content in progress. Migrate the corresponding text here; use `$...$` / `$$...$$` for math, place figures in `images/`, and use ```{r} or ```{python} code blocks.
:::

## The magic of randomization

_To be added._

## Common RCT designs

_To be added._

## Randomization methods

_To be added._

## Blinding

_To be added._

## Non-inferiority trials

_To be added._

## Pragmatic trials

_To be added._

## Adaptive trials

_To be added._

## Interpreting negative RCT results

_To be added._
